settings.badge_text: Honoring Mental Health Awareness Month — May 2026
settings.headline: Your good day starts here.
settings.subheadline: Drift is the app-controlled ambient light clinically recognized for reducing stress, deepening calm, and turning any room into a place your mind can rest.

settings.pull_quote: A good day isn't always big. Sometimes it's five quiet minutes watching patterns move — and finally, your mind goes still.
settings.body_paragraph_1: Mental Health America's 2026 theme asks a simple question: What does a good day look like for you?
settings.body_paragraph_2: For millions of people, the answer starts at home. With a ritual. With a moment of intentional calm.
settings.body_paragraph_3: Drift was built for exactly that.

settings.headline: Three sizes. One purpose.
settings.subhead: Find the drift that fits your space — and your day.
settings.product_1_desc: The drift 10" is your daily ritual — compact enough for a bedside table or desk, powerful enough to shift your entire headspace. WiFi-enabled so you're always in control, even from another room. RGBIC Smart Lights mean no two moments look the same.
settings.product_2_desc: The drift 16" was made for living rooms, shared bedrooms, and the spaces where life happens together. Bigger canvas, bigger calm. Bluetooth-enabled with full RGB lighting for any mood, any moment.
settings.product_3_desc: When you want to transform a room — not just light it — drift 21" is your answer. The largest canvas in the drift family, delivering immersive RGB ambiance that anchors any space in calm.

settings.headline: What the experts say.
settings.subhead: Drift is doctor-recommended for stress relief, mindfulness, and sleep — not just a beautiful object.

settings.headline: Your calm. Your control.
settings.body: drift connects to the Homedics Drift app — giving you complete control over color, brightness, motion speed, and pre-set moods. Schedule your evening wind-down. Wake up to a soft sunrise. Your good day, programmed the night before.
settings.feature_1: Millions of color combinations — set the exact mood you need
settings.feature_2: Schedule lighting modes — sunrise wake-up, evening wind-down
settings.feature_3: WiFi control (Drift 10") — adjust from anywhere in your home

settings.headline: Give her more good days.
settings.subhead: Mother's Day is May 11. Drift is the gift that keeps giving — every evening, every morning, every quiet moment she finally gets to herself.
settings.item_3_desc: For the mom who deserves the room

settings.headline: Your good day is waiting.
settings.body: Start with five minutes. A room that feels different. A light that moves with you. Drift was built for the small moments that change everything.
